---
---

## Slide 1 - Single table

| A | B |
|---|---|
| 1 | 2 |
| 3 | 4 |

## Slide 2 - Multiple tables

| X | Y |
|---|---|
| 1 | 2 |

| P | Q |
|---|---|
| 9 | 8 |

## Slide 3 - Table alongside paragraph

A paragraph next to a table.

| Name | Value |
|------|-------|
| foo  | 1     |
| bar  | 2     |
